subcodes.title: Words to Jinab-i-Hizari et al, spoken on 1913-09-17
subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God that throughout these years of war the friends, wheresoever they dwelt, remained preserved and protected [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله در این سنوات جنگ احباء در هر کجا بودند محفوظ ماندند
subcodes.subjects: @contention and conflict, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @firmness in the Covenant
